message:
feat(api): add health check endpoints for monitoring and CI

This implements a comprehensive health check system with three levels:

/api/health/ready - Kubernetes-style readiness probe
- Returns 200 when app is ready to serve traffic
- Returns 503 with details when dependencies are unhealthy
- Checks registry loading and core functions
- No authentication required (for load balancer probes)

/api/health/status - Detailed system status (admin only)
- Full system information: version, uptime, memory usage
- Detailed check results with timings
- Protected by JFP_HEALTH_STATUS_TOKEN in production
- Open in development for debugging

Health Check Utilities (src/lib/health/checks.ts):
- runReadyChecks(): lightweight checks for readiness
- runStatusChecks(): comprehensive checks with details
- Extensible pattern for adding new checks
- Consistent response format across endpoints

Security:
- Status endpoint requires Bearer token or x-jfp-admin-token header
- Token configured via JFP_HEALTH_STATUS_TOKEN env var
- 403 response for unauthorized status requests
- Ready endpoint intentionally unauthenticated for probes

Use Cases:
- Kubernetes liveness/readiness probes
- Load balancer health checks
- CI/CD deployment verification
- Monitoring dashboard integration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
